author: Youssef Elsekily
name: Elsekily Clean Architecture Template

Framework.description: The target framework for the project.

description: A Clean Architecture ASP.NET Core 8 solution template with CQRS (manual, no MediatR), Entity Framework Core, FluentValidation, Serilog, JWT auth, rate limiting, and Quartz.NET. By Youssef Elsekily.
